Neighborhood · Orange County · Updated June 2026

Restaurants in Dr. Phillips

64%Grade A
4.3Avg rating
70Restaurants

Dr. Phillips is a dining district in Orange County, Central Florida. Explore its 70 restaurants below with health inspection grades, dietary options, and diner ratings — 45 currently hold an A health grade.
